response_text:
ENTITY Passenger
PK passenger_id
ATTR passenger_id : varchar : PK
ATTR given_name : varchar
ATTR family_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_id
ATTR flight_id : varchar : PK
ATTR flight_date : date
ATTR seat : varchar
ATTR baggage_belt : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_id
ATTR airline_id : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY DepartureAirport
PK departure_airport_id
ATTR departure_airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR departure_airport_name : varchar
ATTR departure_location_id : varchar
ATTR departure_city : varchar

ENTITY ArrivalAirport
PK arrival_airport_id
ATTR arrival_airport_id : varchar : PK
ATTR arrival_airport_name : varchar
ATTR arrival_location_id : varchar
ATTR arrival_city : varchar

ENTITY Aircraft
PK aircraft_id
ATTR aircraft_id : varchar : PK
ATTR aircraft_model : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_id
ATTR crew_id : varchar : PK
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR log_id : varchar : PK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

REL Flight -> Passenger : 1..N -> 1 : FK=passenger_id
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_id
REL Flight -> DepartureAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=departure_airport_id
REL Flight -> ArrivalAirport : 1 -> 1 : FK=arrival_airport_id
REL Flight -> Aircraft : 1 -> 1 : FK=aircraft_id
REL Flight -> FlightStatusLog : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_id
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1 -> 1 : FK=status_id
REL Flight -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_id
